Query.SQL: SELECT RC.RETURN_CODE AS "RC.RETURN_CODE", RC.RETURN_TYPE AS "RC.RETURN_TYPE", RC.RETURN_CATEGORY AS "RC.RETURN_CATEGORY", RC.RETURN_CODE_SUMMARY AS "RC.RETURN_CODE_SUMMARY", RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE" FROM RETURN_CODES RC WHERE RC.CURRENT_RETURN = 'Y' AND RC.USER_LIST = 'Y' AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE IN ('0', ${param.courtCode})
